title: Lastrea scariosa
intro: Lastrea scariosa, also known as the scariosa fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Lastrea scariosa include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal effects. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in various folk remedies and traditional medicines.
